
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(glmnet)
library(rsample)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
plot_data <- read_csv("fuels_data.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
head(plot_data)
```
 
```{r}
## training and testing data
set.seed(230)
split_data <- initial_split(plot_data, prop = 0.75, strata = site)
train_data <- training(split_data) %>% dplyr::select(-c(plot))
test_data <- testing(split_data) %>% dplyr::select(-c(plot))

# create model matrices 
x_train = model.matrix(fuel_load_Mg_ha ~ ., data = train_data)[,-1]
y_train = train_data$fuel_load_Mg_ha

x_test = model.matrix(fuel_load_Mg_ha ~ ., data = test_data)[,-1]
y_test = test_data$fuel_load_Mg_ha
```

```{r}
cv_fuels = cv.glmnet(x = x_train, y = y_train, alpha = 0, type.measure = "mse", standardize = TRUE)
coef_lasso <- coef(cv_fuels, s = "lambda.min")
y_pred <- as.numeric(predict(cv_fuels, newx = x_test, s = "lambda.min"))

## mean squared error
rmse <- sqrt(mean((y_test - y_pred)^2))
rmse

rss <- sum((y_test - y_pred)^2)
tss <- sum((y_test - mean(y_test))^2)
r2 <- (1-(rss/tss))
r2
```

```{r}
y_train_pred <- predict(cv_fuels, newx = x_train, s = "lambda.min")
train_residuals <- y_train - y_train_pred

res_df <- data.frame(
  y = y_train,
  predicted = as.numeric(y_train_pred),
  residuals = as.numeric(train_residuals)
)

ggplot(res_df, aes(x = predicted, y = residuals)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Residual Plot",
       x = "Predicted values",
       y = "Residuals") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(res_df, aes(x = y, y = predicted)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, color = "red") + 
  labs(title = "Fitted Line Plot",
       x = "y",
       y = "y_hat") +
  theme_minimal() + 
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-20, 300)) + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-20, 300))
```
